content.en:
"Let's go, I'll take you to the territory of the Void Demon Clan!"

Yama-san said urgently.

Immediately, Yamasan took Ye Tian to move quickly, and a month later, Ye Tian saw a huge hole.

This hole appeared in his sight, as if the void of the void had been pierced.

"Ye Yi, this is one of the passages leading to other areas of the Void Realm, otherwise, if you want to pass through the various areas of the Void Realm, even if you want to pass through the various regions of the Void Realm, even I will have to pay a little price!"

Yamasan said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, followed Yamasan into this passage, and soon came to another void area.

Of course.

This Void Realm area was not the destination of Ye Tian and Yamasan, they needed to pass through several Void Realm Regions before they could finally reach the area where the Void Demon Clan was.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

In the blink of an eye, more than four months have passed.

And now, there are not many days left until the end of the year.

Ye Tian thought to himself that if he hadn't been ostracized by the Void Realm after a year, would the Terran powerhouses in the outside world think that he had fallen?

"Probably not, I'm not a child of the universe now, and if I am not blessed by the universe, it shouldn't be difficult to deduce my life and death. Besides, even if they are the children of the universe, the supremes of the human race can deduce life and death!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, he stopped thinking about these questions.

......

Ye Tiangang passed through a passage and came to an unfamiliar void area, and the voice of Yama San came from his ears.

"It's here!"

At this time, Yamasan reminded: "Remember, when encountering Void Demons, there is no need to use special moves, because you can't kill them, as long as you get them seriously injured or trapped, otherwise in a place like the Void Realm, we will be suppressed, and it is a complete waste of energy to waste our strength to try to bombard the Void Demons!"

"I know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

However, this time, he is only assisting, and he may not necessarily fight against the Void Demon, mainly relying on the starry-level Void Kun of Yama San.

Whew!!

One person and one Xukun flew towards the center of the area.

A few days later, Ye Tian saw a pitch-black, scaly, humanoid creature.

"Is this an Void Demon?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, this is the Void Demon!" Yama replied.

Then, Yama's three thoughts moved, and a spatial blade slashed through.

Poof!!

This void demon was directly cut by a spatial blade of Yama San, and even its entire body exploded, turning into countless fragments.

But in the blink of an eye, the Void Demon was back to its original state.

"Not dead!"

Ye Tian really saw what it meant to be immortal, it was obviously just a god-level cultivator, and the space blade of a galaxy-level powerhouse had not been able to kill it.

If it was before, Ye Tian wouldn't have believed it at all.

But now, he had to believe.

"Copy the talent!"

Ye Tian turned on the copying talent and shrouded this void demon, wanting to see if this void demon had any amazing talent.

Species: Void Demon

Bloodline Talent: Dawn Level

Strength Talents: Top

Speed Talent: Arcanon

Undead Talent: Top

Healing Talents: Mystery Paths

......

"There is no special talent, it seems that the Void Demon Clan can be immortal, not because of the talent, but because this clan can maintain immortality with the help of the Heavenly Dao power of the Void Realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, this ability has limitations, that is, it is limited to the area of the void, and it is impossible to leave here, otherwise it will not be able to control the power of the Heavenly Dao to remain immortal.

And the Void Demon Clan itself is very weak, so they don't dare to leave their territory at all.

Otherwise, once they leave their territory, if the Void Demon Clan is the slightest bit dangerous, they will die, after all, their own strength is really weak.

"Don't be afraid, the Void Demon Clan in this area is not strong, and the most powerful one is also at the Galaxy level, but its strength is much worse than mine, although I can't kill it, I can use the spatial magic power to trap it. As for the other Void Demons, they don't pose the slightest threat to me at all. You can attack the Void Demon, but don't get too far away from me, or I may not be able to rescue you in time!"

Yamasan admonished.

Ye Tian kept in mind that he also knew that his strength was still very weak, so he naturally didn't dare to leave Yama San too far.

As he went deeper into the territory of the Void Demon Clan, he encountered more and more Void Demon Clan, but these Void Demons were completely unable to compete with Yama San, and were easily defeated by Yama San, although they could not kill them, but they could make them weak and unable to attack Yama San.

After a while, Yamasan took Ye Tian to the area where the Heavenly Dao Tree was located, which was also the headquarters of the Void Demon.

"That's the Heavenly Dao Tree!"

Yamasan pointed to the giant tree rooted in the void and said.

Ye Tian looked over, and saw a golden giant tree rooted in the void, firmly connected with this void, there were many leaves on the tree, these leaves were black, but there was a golden light coming out of the body, it was the Heavenly Dao leaf.

The aura on this Heavenly Dao was incomparably supreme, and it even transmitted a force that was difficult to resist.

"The power of the Heavenly Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This Heavenly Dao Tree is a true treasure, but unfortunately it is difficult to take it away, but it is not difficult to take it away.

At this moment, a bunch of Void Demons rushed over.

Because they are almost impossible to kill, these void demons are not afraid of death at all, even if Yama San is a galaxy-level powerhouse, they still don't admit it, and rush over with a desperate posture.

Yama's three giant mouths roared violently, and the space shook, sweeping across this space.

A large number of Void Demons were shocked into powder, but in the blink of an eye, they were complete again, but they fell into a weakened state.

"Xukun, you're here again!"

The Great Elder of the Void Demon Clan appeared, and the momentum of the star-level powerhouse shrouded him.

At this moment, Yamasan teleported over and created a huge space ball that enveloped the Great Elder of the Void Demon Clan, suppressing and trapping it.

Thundered!!!!

No matter how the Great Elder of the Void Demon Clan attacked, he couldn't break through the space ball made by Yama-san.

As for the other Void Demons, although they wanted to rescue their Great Elders, their strength was too weak, and Yama San could shoot them off in the air.

"Ye Yi, you go in quickly!"

Yamasan said.

"Yama San, I'll collect some Heavenly Dao Leaves first!"

Ye Tian hurriedly flew to the Heavenly Dao Tree and began to pick Heavenly Dao leaves.

Seeing this scene, Yamasan said helplessly: "Ye Yi, this Heavenly Dao Ye is useless, didn't I give you a piece? One piece is enough, what are you doing with so much?"

Ye Yi ignored it and continued to collect Heavenly Dao leaves.

If he was really a void, he would definitely not care about the Heavenly Dao Leaf, but he was a human race, and this Heavenly Dao Leaf was a treasure for the human race, and its value was too high!

In case there is no harvest inside the Heavenly Dao Tree, these Heavenly Dao leaves alone will be enough for him to make a fortune.

If you don't take these Heavenly Dao leaves, and you don't have any harvest in the internal space of the Heavenly Dao Tree, wouldn't it be a trip for nothing?

After a while, Ye Tian plucked all the thousands of leaves on the Heavenly Dao Tree and put them into his Void Mina Realm.

In the future, I am afraid that it will not be a short time before the Heavenly Dao Tree will be full of thousands of leaves again.

Then.

Ye Tiancai planned to enter the Heavenly Dao space inside the Heavenly Dao Tree.

The Heavenly Dao Space is connected with the outside world, and Ye Tian has a god-level spatial talent, so he can naturally sense the spatial fluctuations of the Heavenly Dao Space.

Following the fluctuations of the space, Ye Tian shuttled into the Heavenly Dao space.

As soon as he entered the Heavenly Dao space, he felt a strong oppression.

"Heavenly Dao Mu Xin, I don't know where this thing is?"

Ye Tian began to look for Heavenly Dao Mu Xin.

Suddenly.

Several killers rushed over.

Swish!

Ye Tian moved, and when he looked at it with his copying talent, he found that it was a few void demons.

"By the way, the Void Demon Clan will definitely send some Void Demons to stay in the Heavenly Dao Space. However, even if it is a Void Demon Clan, it will also be suppressed in the Heavenly Dao Space, and my strength here is definitely stronger than other Void Demons!" Ye Tian said confidently.

"Ten thousand times into one!"

The 10,000-fold enchantment turned into one, easily lower than the attacks of those Void Demons.

And although Ye Tian's attack could penetrate or tear the Void Demon apart again and again, there was no way to kill it.

In desperation, Ye Tian could only collect these Void Demons into the Void Mina Realm in the Void Mi's palm and temporarily trap them.

Seeing that one was trapped one by one, after a while, all the Void Demons guarded by the Heavenly Dao Space were collected by Ye Tian into the Void Mina Realm in the palm of his hand.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the center of the Heavenly Dao space.

Here, he saw a golden lake, and in the midst of it flowed a golden liquid substance, filled with unimaginable pure energy.

Ye Tian didn't know what the liquid substance in this golden lake was, but it felt like it was definitely a good thing!

And floating on the golden lake was a huge ball of light, and in the cluster of light there was a golden wood, not very long, about two meters long and twenty centimeters thick.

"Heavenly Dao Wood Heart!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

This wood must be the heart of the Heavenly Dao Wood, and it can't be wrong.

Immediately, Ye Tian wanted to reach out and grab this Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, but then the light group shook slightly, and directly flew Ye Tianzhen out.

At this time, Ye Tiancai woke up suddenly.

The Heavenly Dao Wood Heart is the origin treasure bred by the Heavenly Dao Tree, how can it be that there is no protection at all, if it is really so easy to take it away, wouldn't everyone be able to take it away?

Rumble!!!

A powerful aura burst out of the light.

Then, a figure stepped out of the light.

This figure was dressed in golden armor and a golden cloak, and was full of golden Guan Hui and the power of the Heavenly Dao.

"Heavenly Dao Guardian!"

Ye Tian became slightly solemn.

This Heavenly Dao Guardian is obviously not simple, and it is even more terrifying than the Heavenly Dao Guardian that he encountered in the Void Heavenly Dao Text Realm before!

There is a guardian of the Heavenly Dao here, and Yama-san has never told him, and perhaps even Yama-san doesn't know very well, after all, Yama-san has never entered the Heavenly Dao space.

Moreover, with the difficulty of the Heavenly Dao space, it would be difficult for other Xukun to succeed in taking away the Heavenly Dao Mu Heart.

Therefore, the Xukun clan did not know much about the Heavenly Dao space.

"As long as I defeat this Heavenly Dao Guardian, I should be able to take the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
